mapper.select: -- selectVisitorStatistics SELECT YEAR(reg_dt) AS statYear, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(reg_dt) < MONTH(#{fixedDate}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS prevAcc, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(reg_dt) = MONTH(#{fixedDate}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS targetVal FROM ( SELECT reg_dt, CASE WHEN user_oid IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('U_', user_oid) ELSE CONCAT('T_', ssn_id) END AS user_key FROM ${schema}.user_acs_log WHERE acs_type = 'PAGE' AND ( /* 올해 범위: 올해 1월 1일 ~ 당월 말일 */ (reg_dt >= DATE_FORMAT(#{fixedDate}, '%Y-01-01') AND reg_dt < DATE_ADD(#{fixedDate}, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) OR /* 작년 범위: 작년 1월 1일 ~ 작년 동월 말일 */ (reg_dt >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(#{fixedDate}, INTERVAL 1 YEAR), '%Y-01-01') AND reg_dt < DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(#{fixedDate}, INTERVAL 1 YEAR), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) ) GROUP BY DATE(reg_dt), user_key ) AS VisitorLog GROUP BY statYear ORDER BY statYear DESC

-- selectInquiryStatistics SELECT YEAR(tbbp.reg_dt) AS statYear, COUNT(CASE WHEN MONTH(tbbp.reg_dt) < MONTH(#{fixedDate}) THEN 1 END) AS prevAcc, COUNT(CASE WHEN MONTH(tbbp.reg_dt) = MONTH(#{fixedDate}) THEN 1 END) AS targetVal FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst tbbp INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs tbb on tbb.bbs_oid = tbbp.bbs_oid WHERE tbbp.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NULL AND tbb.bbs_se_cd = 'QNA' AND tbb.stats_yn ='Y' AND tbb.use_yn = 'Y' AND tbbp.del_yn = 'N' AND ( (tbbp.reg_dt >= DATE_FORMAT(#{fixedDate}, '%Y-01-01') AND tbbp.reg_dt < DATE_ADD(#{fixedDate}, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) OR (tbbp.reg_dt >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(#{fixedDate}, INTERVAL 1 YEAR), '%Y-01-01') AND tbbp.reg_dt < DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(#{fixedDate}, INTERVAL 1 YEAR), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) ) GROUP BY statYear ORDER BY statYear DESC

-- selectResponseStatistics SELECT YEAR(ans_dt) AS statYear, COUNT(CASE WHEN MONTH(ans_dt) < MONTH(#{fixedDate}) THEN 1 END) AS prevAcc, COUNT(CASE WHEN MONTH(ans_dt) = MONTH(#{fixedDate}) THEN 1 END) AS targetVal FROM ( SELECT MIN(tbbp.reg_dt) AS ans_dt FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst tbbp INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs tbb ON tbb.bbs_oid = tbbp.bbs_oid WHERE up_bbs_pst_oid IS NOT NULL AND tbb.bbs_se_cd = 'QNA' AND tbb.stats_yn ='Y' AND tbb.use_yn = 'Y' AND tbbp.del_yn = 'N' AND ( (tbbp.reg_dt >= DATE_FORMAT(#{fixedDate}, '%Y-01-01') AND tbbp.reg_dt < DATE_ADD(#{fixedDate}, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) OR (tbbp.reg_dt >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(#{fixedDate}, INTERVAL 1 YEAR), '%Y-01-01') AND tbbp.reg_dt < DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(#{fixedDate}, INTERVAL 1 YEAR), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) ) GROUP BY up_bbs_pst_oid ) AS AnswerData GROUP BY statYear ORDER BY statYear DESC
